caption:
Experience MOVIE MAGIC at Reel Cinemas at Dubai Mall, Dubai Marina Mall and Spring Souk. 

Catch the latest blockbusters and watch out for Dubai Summer Surprises! 

🎥 24-28 July: Book your tickets for Oppenheimer at Dolby Cinema in Dubai Mall from 24-28 July for a chance to win a Samsung 98-inch TV.
 👻 26 July: Haunted Mansion premiere
 ☀️ 29 July: Catch Modesh and Dana tour on a tour at At The Top, Burj Khalifa

Tag your family and friends!
